title: rosa × vetteri var. toddiae
intro: Rosa × vetteri var. toddiae, also known as Todd's hybrid rose, is a hybrid tea rose plant that is a cross between Rosa × vetteri and an unnamed Rosa species. The medicinal properties of Rosa × vetteri var. toddiae are derived from its flowers, which are used in herbal remedies to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The herbal preparations of Rosa × vetteri var. toddiae typically involve infusing its flowers in hot water to create a tea or using them in tinctures and topical creams to address skin issues.
